data.description: Trump wants new classes of Navy ships to counter China, and other potential threats - WSJ.

data.title: U.S. News releases ratings for 2026 Best Insurance Companies for Medicare Advantage and Part D with 37 quality measures.
data.description: Updated ratings, based on an assessment of 37 quality criteria, are now available to aid Medicare beneficiaries in finding their way through the evolving healthcare system during the yearly Open Enrollment period. These ratings were released on October 17, 2025, by U.S. News & World Report, a leading source of health care evaluations. The ratings offer valuable insights for beneficiaries as they make decisions, helping them navigate the complexities of Medicare with more information at their disposal.

data.title: ETHZilla to release Q3 2025 financial results on Sept. 30, 2025. (Nasdaq: ETHZ). Connecting traditional & decentralized finance.
data.description: In Palm Beach, Florida, on October 24, 2025, ETHZilla Corporation (Nasdaq: ETHZ), a prominent tech firm bridging traditional finance and decentralized finance, revealed plans to unveil its third-quarter financial outcomes for the period ending on September 30, 2025, before the undisclosed time.

data.title: Nvidia stock rises due to collaboration with Schneider Electric to develop an 800 VDC sidecar for high-density data centers.
data.description: Nvidia Corporation's shares (NASDAQ: NVDA) saw an increase as Schneider Electric (OTC: SBGSY) revealed a partnership with Nvidia to create an 800 VDC sidecar for powering up to 1.2 MW racks to support upcoming Nvidia GPUs and accelerated computing infrastructure upgrades. This collaboration underscores Schneider Electric's dedication to facilitating the shift towards 800 VDC power systems, essential for the new high-density rack units adopted by next-gen data centers. While current data centers operate on 54-volt power setups suitable for smaller racks, the demand for AI factories necessitates power on a megawatt scale, prompting the requirement for scalable 800-volt systems incorporating energy storage. This innovative sidecar solution...

data.title: Inventor from Virginia creates SHERIS COOKIE COTTAGE for storage and cooling of baked goods.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, an inventor from New Kent, Virginia shared that while baking for Christmas, they encountered challenges in storing and cooling cookies and baked goods. This led to the creation of the SHERIS COOKIE COTTAGE. The innovative product offers a new solution and could potentially address the storage issues faced by many. This invention presents an alternative approach in managing baked goods during the holiday season.

data.title: AT&T launches Connectopia at Intuit Dome, using Fiber and 5G for an immersive fan experience with 8K visuals.
data.description: In Dallas on October 24, 2025, AT&T introduced Connectopia as a groundbreaking AI-driven world-building platform, utilizing AT&T Fiber and 5G technology to enhance fan interaction. This innovative experience offers 8K visuals and cutting-edge technology to revolutionize engagement. The launch event took place at the AT&T Deck in Intuit, marking a significant advancement in immersive entertainment.

data.title: Polymarket plans token launch, targeting $15 billion valuation in upcoming funding round.
data.description: Polymarket, a leading prediction market platform, is gearing up to introduce a new native token and distribute it through an airdrop as part of its efforts to secure additional funding at an augmented valuation. The platform's Chief Marketing Officer, Matthew Modabber, has affirmed that the token will be rolled out post the official relaunch in the United States, which is presently in progress. This development is anticipated to trigger a significant increase in liquidity as Polymarket, renowned for allowing users to bet on various events like elections and Federal Reserve decisions, continues to expand its presence in the U.S. The escalating activity in the prediction market sector has positioned it as one of the... (continued on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Theriva Biologics responds to unusual market activity on October 24, 2025, citing no material developments or corrective actions needed. Expanded data from VIRAGE trial presented on October 13, 2025 at ESMO 2025.
data.description: Theriva™ Biologics, a clinical-stage company listed on NYSE American under symbol TOVX, disclosed the detection of unusual trading in its stock on Oct. 24, 2025. In compliance with NYSE regulations, the Company issued a statement asserting that after an investigation, no corrective measures were deemed necessary. There were no significant undisclosed developments in the Company's operations to explain the trading activity. However, on Oct. 13, 2025, Theriva had shared extended data from its VIRAGE trial on VCN-01 at ESMO 2025 Annual Congress during a mini oral presentation.

data.title: MM's Tristan Southard named Top Lobbyist for 2025 by NILE. Over 550 nominations received.
data.description: In Washington, as of October 24, 2025, Vice President Tristan Southard of Merchant McIntyre & Associates has been honored as one of the Top Lobbyists for 2025 by the National Institute for Lobbying & Ethics (NILE). This accolade comes after over 550 nominations were received for the 2025 awards.

data.title: HYPE token surges 10% after Robinhood listing and $1B treasury raise announcement.
data.description: Following its listing on Robinhood, the Hyperliquid (HYPE) token has experienced a significant 10% increase in price. Moreover, the token has also raised an impressive $1 billion in treasury funds.

data.title: CVR to hold VISION26 conference in Washington, DC from Jan 9-11, 2026, focusing on venous and lymphatic medicine.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, in Greenbelt, Maryland, the Center for Vein Restoration (CVR) unveiled VISION26, their yearly conference aimed at progress in venous and lymphatic medicine. Scheduled from January 9 to 11, 2026, the event will be hosted at the Marriott Marquis. CVR, as the leading physician-directed vein center in the country, organizes this conference to promote knowledge sharing and advancements in the field. This gathering serves as a platform for professionals to exchange insights and discoveries in the sphere of venous and lymphatic medicine.

data.title: West-MEC in Glendale, AZ, vital for workforce prep in region's growth. Established 20+ years ago, continues to support economic expansion.
data.description: In Glendale, Arizona, on October 24, 2025, the Western Maricopa Education Center (West-MEC) remains a key player in readying Arizona's workforce for the challenges of the area's fast-growing economy. Operating for over 20 years, West-MEC has expanded significantly from its humble beginnings.

data.title: "Discover Jewish art hubs worldwide in Directory of Jewish Arts & Museums 2025 including museums, galleries, schools, and more."
data.description: A new directory, the "Directory of Jewish Arts & Museums 2025," is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This comprehensive guide covers Jewish Galleries & Museums, Fine Arts Schools and Colleges, Associations, Trade Fairs, and Publishers globally. The directory highlights the Jewish Arts and Museum scene worldwide, encompassing museums, public galleries, publishers, and the art trade. It offers information on thousands of art establishments, providing a valuable resource for those interested in the Jewish arts industry.

data.title: Notification TR-1 and report on blocked shares submitted, affecting total of 20 million shares.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has increased by 2% in the past quarter, reaching a total of 6%. This has resulted in approximately 1.5 million individuals being out of work. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 3% decline, with the main index dropping to 10,000 points. Experts are attributing these changes to ongoing economic instability and global market fluctuations. Efforts are being made to address the situation and stabilize the economy.

data.title: AUCC partners with 23XI Racing and Xfinity for Atlanta HBCU Takeover and NASCAR Race Watch Party.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, in Atlanta, the Atlanta University Center Consortium (AUCC) revealed a new collaboration with 23XI Racing, Xfinity, and GMR Marketing. This partnership will bring forth the Atlanta HBCU Takeover/NASCAR Race Watch Party, marking a unique event that celebrates both culture and community.
